Let your children play with the bubble wand machine outdoors at night and experience beautiful bubble good times.

Child-Safe Material: The automatic bubble machine is made of environmentally friendly and non-toxic ABS plastic, which is of high quality and durable. Meets international toy standards and is safe for children, toddlers, pets and adults. The bubble solution has passed safety testing, the bubble wand is tightly connected to the solution bottle and will not leak the solution, we include 5 bags of bubble concentrate to bring happy bubble time at any time and make outdoor play time more enjoyable.

Suitable for Different Activities: The bubble blower is a must-have outdoor toy for various occasions, it not only provides endless joy for children, adults, pets, but is also perfect for children's birthday parties, family gatherings, weddings, dog, cat and pet play, festivals Romantic atmosphere decoration for parties, camping, pool parties, any holiday and more.
